cells.rationale: New mint-event-plus-per-cycle-clear distress family spanning dispatch-failure keys, reconcile snapshot threading, and restart-survivable latching demands subtle correctness invariants and a cross-file contract cascade, a nameable opus reason.

Rewriting the resync to git read-tree/update-index plumbing with all-or-nothing abort carries data-loss and path-traversal safety invariants where a wrong abstraction clobbers human edits, a hard opus correctness gate.
